tip_save_cfg: Save config (stop the server first to edit params)
no_models_hint: Configure a models directory in Settings
h_alias: Name used in /models/load, /models/unload and client requests
section_load_params_hint: (written to presets.ini, applied on model load)
h_ngl: Number of model layers to offload to GPU; 999 = all layers
h_ctx: Maximum tokens the model can process in one context window
h_mlock: Prevents model pages from being swapped out
h_batch: Logical max tokens processed per forward pass (prefill throughput)
h_ubatch: Physical max tokens per micro-batch; must be ≤ batch size
h_ctk: Quantization format for KV cache keys; q8_0/q4_0 saves VRAM
h_ctv: Quantization format for KV cache values; q8_0/q4_0 saves VRAM
h_cache_reuse: Min tokens to reuse from KV cache for matching prompt prefix (multi-turn speedup)
h_n_parallel: Simultaneous inference requests; higher values increase throughput but use more memory
h_threads: Number of CPU threads for generation; -1 lets the server choose automatically
h_threads_batch: CPU threads for prompt processing; defaults to the generation thread count
h_seed: Fixed seed for reproducible outputs; -1 uses a random seed each run
h_jinja: Required for tool calls and function calling
h_rf: Controls how chain-of-thought tokens are formatted in responses
h_rb: Max thinking tokens allowed; -1 = unlimited, 0 = disable CoT entirely
h_temp: Randomness of outputs; lower = more deterministic, higher = more creative
h_topp: Nucleus sampling: keep only tokens whose cumulative probability exceeds this value
h_topk: Limit token candidates to the top K most likely at each step
h_minp: Minimum probability threshold relative to the most likely token
h_kv_offload: Moves KV cache to VRAM; recommended when VRAM is plentiful
h_unified_kv: Single shared KV cache across all parallel slots
